languages.text: {n}Магос надолго замолкает. Когда он вновь начинает говорить, его голос звучит слабо, будто издалека.{/n} "Познание есть ключ ко всему, а понимание — есть путь к познанию. Допустим, мои инфо-координаты основаны на ложной точке отсчета. Какую предлагаете принять вы?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Магос надолго замолкает. Когда он вновь начинает говорить, его голос звучит слабо, будто издалека.{/n}"Познание есть ключ ко всему, а понимание — есть путь к познанию. Допустим, мои координаты основаны на ложной точке отсчета. Какую предлагаете принять вы?"

languages.text: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"
languages.original_text: {n}Магос надолго замолкает. Когда он вновь начинает говорить, его голос звучит слабо, будто издалека.{/n} "Познание есть ключ ко всему, а понимание — есть путь к познанию. Допустим, мои инфо-координаты основаны на ложной точке отсчета. Какую предлагаете принять вы?"

languages.text: {n}贤者沉默了许久。当他再次开口时，声音听起来很微弱，仿佛从遥远之处传来。{/n}“知识是万物的钥匙，而理解是通往知识的道路。假设我的数据坐标建立在错误的基准点上，那么你打算提出什么替代方案？”

Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"

traits.locale_text: {n}贤者沉默了许久。当他再次开口时，声音听起来很微弱，仿佛从遥远之处传来。{/n}“知识是万物的钥匙，而理解是通往知识的道路。假设我的数据坐标建立在错误的基准点上，那么你打算提出什么替代方案？”

languages.text: {n}Le magos garde le silence pendant un long moment. Lorsqu'il se remet à parler, c'est d'une voix ténue qui donne l'impression de venir de très loin.{/n} « La connaissance est la clé de tout et la compréhension est la voie qui y mène. Admettons que mes coordonnées soient basées sur un faux point de référence. Quelle alternative proposez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le magos garde le silence pendant un long moment. Lorsqu'il se remet à parler, c'est d'une voix ténue qui donne l'impression de venir de très loin.{/n} « La connaissance est la clé de tout et la compréhension est la voie qui y mène. Admettons que mes coordonnées soient basées sur un faux point de référence. Quelle alternative proposez-vous ? »

languages.text: {n}Magos, uzun süre sessiz kalıyor. Tekrar konuşmaya başladığında sesi, sanki uzaktan geliyormuş gibi cılız çıkıyor.{/n} "İrfan her şeyin anahtarıdır. İdrak ise irfana giden yoldur. Veri koordinatlarımın yanlış referans noktasına dayandığını varsayalım. Nasıl bir alternatif öneriyorsunuz?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Magos, uzun süre sessiz kalıyor. Tekrar konuşmaya başladığında sesi, sanki uzaktan geliyormuş gibi cılız çıkıyor.{/n} "İrfan her şeyin anahtarıdır. İdrak ise irfana giden yoldur. Veri koordinatlarımın yanlış referans noktasına dayandığını varsayalım. Nasıl bir alternatif öneriyorsunuz?"

languages.text: {n}El magos guarda silencio durante un largo rato. Cuando habla de nuevo, su voz es débil, como si recorriera una gran distancia.{/n} «El conocimiento es la clave de todo, y la comprensión es el camino que conduce a él. Supongamos que mis coordenadas de datos están basadas en un punto de referencia falso. ¿Qué alternativa propone?».
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"

traits.locale_text: {n}El magos guarda silencio durante un largo rato. Cuando habla de nuevo, su voz es débil, como si recorriera una gran distancia.{/n} «El conocimiento es la clave de todo, y la comprensión es el camino que conduce a él. Supongamos que mis coordenadas de datos están basadas en un punto de referencia falso. ¿Qué alternativa propone?».

languages.text: {n}Der Magos schweigt lange Zeit. Als er erneut das Wort ergreift, ist seine Stimme schwach, als käme sie aus weiter Ferne.{/n} "Wissen ist der Schlüssel für alles, und Verständnis ist der Weg zum Wissen. Nehmen wir einmal an, meine Datenkoordinaten basieren auf einem falschen Referenzpunkt. Welche Alternativen schlagt Ihr vor?"
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Magos schweigt lange Zeit. Als er erneut das Wort ergreift, ist seine Stimme schwach, als käme sie aus weiter Ferne.{/n} "Wissen ist der Schlüssel für alles, und Verständnis ist der Weg zum Wissen. Nehmen wir einmal an, meine Datenkoordinaten basieren auf einem falschen Referenzpunkt. Welche Alternativen schlagt Ihr vor?"

languages.text: {n}マゴスは長い沈黙の後、再び声をあげた。彼の声は遠くから聞こえるかのように、かすれた。{/n} 「知識は万物の鍵であり、理解は知識への道である。もし私のデータ座標が誤った基準に基づいているとすれば、あなたはどのような代替案を提案するのか？」
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos is silent for a long time. When he begins to speak again, his voice sounds faint, as though it is travelling across a great distance.{/n} "Knowledge is the key to everything, and comprehension is the path to knowledge. Let us suppose that my data-coordinates are based on a false point of reference. What alternative are you proposing?"
